source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for dense recovery operations UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, metadata, and numerals.
layout: Sparse volcanic-plain grids, compact monitoring panels, 8px component radius, matte borders, quiet charts, and rust-colored focus paths.

prompts.label: Transparent ash field motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an ash field motif for a Morphous design-system bundle named "Morphous Ash Field". The subject is a compact isolated volcanic plain fragment: layered ash grey crust, black pumice stones, rust mineral streaks, shallow wind-raked ridges, and sparse recovery-system survey markers implied only by precise ground geometry. No text.
Subject: A single complete cutout-like volcanic ash-field terrain island, low relief, broken matte ash plates, black pumice clusters, oxidized rust veins, fine granular texture, minimal resilient recovery mood.
Composition/framing: centered full subject with generous padding, no cropped edges, no horizon, no sky, no people, no plants, no buildings.
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting, quiet minimal recovery system, restrained contrast, material detail visible.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no landscape scene, no volcano cone, no smoke, no lava glow, no cartoon style, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Ash Field" derived from the visible transparent volcanic ash-field motif: ash grey crust, black pumice, rust mineral streaks, granular wind-raked texture, and a minimal recovery system mood.
Reference use: Use the motif image visible in this conversation as the source of truth for palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing, radius, data display tone, and interaction language. This light board is the primary reference for coding a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Canvas: exact 16:9 3840x2160 design-board composition, clean product-system layout, large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Ash Field, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: ash grey surface, black pumice ink, rust oxide accent, pale ash background, basalt border, mineral ember focus, weathered stone muted states. Avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance, restrained labels, maintenance/recovery operations tone.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, sparse charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, small icon set.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, minimal recovery system, quiet operational UI, dense but readable grid, 8px card radius, matte ash surfaces, pumice dividers, rust focus and warning accents.
Constraints: no stock landing page, no decorative hero card, no generic blue/purple gradients, no lava glow, no volcano scene, no illegible tiny text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Ash Field", no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Ash Field design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent volcanic ash-field motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve ash grey crust, black pumice surfaces, rust oxide accent, mineral ember focus states, granular texture panels, minimal recovery-system tone, Japanese typography guidance, and full shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact 16:9 3840x2160 design-board composition, clean product-system layout, large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Ash Field, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: soot-black background, charcoal and basalt cards, ash grey text, pale ash secondary text, rust oxide active states, mineral ember ring/focus, pumice borders, matte terrain texture samples, quiet operational status panels.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, sparse charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, small icon set.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, dense but readable grid, minimal recovery system, 8px card radius, no neon overload, no pure flat black-only background.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no lava glow, no volcano scene, no illegible tiny text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Ash Field", no watermark.
